name: X-Terra Resources Inc.
summary: X-Terra Resources Inc., an exploration stage company, acquires, explores, and develops mining, and oil and gas properties in Canada. It explores for gold, copper, silver, and nickel deposits. The company holds 100% interests in the Troilus East property located in north central Qu√É¬©bec, Canada; and the Ducran property comprising of 75 mining claims covering an area of 4160 hectares situated in Qu√É¬©bec, Canada. It also holds an option to acquire 70% interest in the Grog and Northwest property that consists of 38 claims covering an area of 28,000 hectares located in north eastern New Brunswick, Canada, as well holds interests in the Veronneau property situated in the sub province of Opatica and Nemiscau. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Rouyn-Noranda, Canada.
